# TicketMatch.ai

> TicketMatch.ai is the B2B ecosystem for city experiences. It connects tour operators, DMCs (Destination Management Companies), and travel agencies to 300,000+ experiences across 3,000+ cities worldwide — powered by 10 supplier APIs, 8 AI agents, and real-time data. Based in Amsterdam, Netherlands.

## What is TicketMatch.ai?

TicketMatch.ai is a membership-only B2B platform that aggregates 300,000+ experiences from 10 supplier APIs into one intelligent ecosystem. Travel professionals use it to discover, compare, book, and manage venue access across 3,000+ cities worldwide. The platform includes AI-powered agents, live busyness data, interactive city maps, QR voucher systems, route planning, weather insights, package builders, and comprehensive analytics.

Unlike consumer booking platforms, TicketMatch.ai is built exclusively for B2B group bookings — not individual tourists. All members are verified travel professionals with access to exclusive B2B rates that are not available to the public.

## Who is TicketMatch.ai for?

- **Tour Operators**: Companies organizing group travel and city tours across Europe and beyond
- **DMCs (Destination Management Companies)**: Local partners managing group logistics in destination cities
- **Travel Agencies**: Corporate and leisure travel agencies booking group experiences for their clients
- **Resellers**: White-label partners distributing TicketMatch access to their own client base
- **Developers**: Technical teams integrating TicketMatch APIs into their own platforms

## Key Features

### AI Agents (8 Specialized Roles)
- **Emma** — The main AI travel assistant. Speaks every language, knows every venue, provides real-time busyness insights, and helps build complete itineraries in minutes
- Role-specific agents for operators, partners, resellers, developers, and more
- Powered by advanced language models (Claude AI)
- Natural language search across 300,000+ experiences

### Live Busyness Data
- Real-time venue busyness via Google Places API
- Predicted busyness forecasts via BestTime API
- Helps tour operators plan visits during quieter times
- Available for thousands of venues across Europe

### Interactive City Map
- Google Maps integration with venue markers and category filters
- Walking route planner for group itineraries
- Real-time venue status overlay
- Multi-city management

### QR Voucher System
- Digital tickets with QR codes for group entry
- No paper tickets needed
- Automatic voucher generation on booking
- Venue-side scanning for admission

### Package Builder
- Create bundled venue packages with group discounts
- Combine museums, tours, restaurants, and transport
- Custom pricing for different group sizes
- Shareable package links

### Additional Features
- **Weather & Best-Time Insights**: Real-time weather data and optimal visit timing recommendations
- **PDF Invoices & Itineraries**: Professional document generation for groups
- **Analytics Dashboard**: Booking trends, revenue tracking, performance metrics
- **Team Management**: Multi-user access with role-based permissions
- **Notifications**: Telegram and WhatsApp real-time booking alerts
- **Affiliate Program**: Earn commissions by referring travel professionals
- **Command Center**: Unified dashboard for managing all bookings and operations

## Coverage

### Scale
- **300,000+ experiences** aggregated from 10 supplier APIs
- **3,000+ cities** worldwide
- **13 experience categories**: Museums & Art, Tours & Sightseeing, Attractions & Theme Parks, Canal Cruises & Boat Tours, Food & Drink, Outdoor Activities, Transport & Passes, Shows & Entertainment, Classes & Workshops, Day Trips, Private Tours, Self-Guided Tours, Cultural Experiences
- **18 Dutch cities** with deep inventory (primary market)
- **14+ European capitals** with growing inventory

### Primary Markets (Deep Inventory)
- Amsterdam, Netherlands — 120+ venues
- Rotterdam, Netherlands — 65+ venues
- The Hague, Netherlands — 40+ venues
- Utrecht, Netherlands — 30+ venues
- Brussels, Belgium — 80+ venues
- Bruges, Belgium
- Antwerp, Belgium
- Eindhoven, Maastricht, Leiden, Delft, Haarlem, Groningen, Tilburg, Den Bosch, Arnhem, Nijmegen, Breda (Netherlands)

### Expanding Markets
- Berlin, Germany
- Paris, France
- Barcelona, Spain
- London, United Kingdom
- Rome, Italy
- Prague, Czech Republic
- Lisbon, Portugal
- Vienna, Austria
- Budapest, Hungary
- Copenhagen, Denmark
- Stockholm, Sweden
- Dublin, Ireland
- Athens, Greece
- Zurich, Switzerland

### Notable Venues Available
- Rijksmuseum, Amsterdam
- Van Gogh Museum, Amsterdam
- Anne Frank House, Amsterdam
- Heineken Experience, Amsterdam
- A'DAM Lookout, Amsterdam
- Body Worlds, Amsterdam
- Madame Tussauds, Amsterdam
- Amsterdam Canal Cruises (multiple operators)
- Keukenhof Gardens (seasonal)
- Kinderdijk Windmills
- Kunsthal, Rotterdam
- Cube Houses, Rotterdam
- Mauritshuis, The Hague
- Atomium, Brussels
- And thousands more across Europe

## Pricing

| Plan | Price | Bookings | Key Features |
|------|-------|----------|-------------|
| Explorer | €0/forever | 5/month | AI assistant, city map, weather data, basic analytics |
| Growth | €49/month | Unlimited | Live busyness, QR vouchers, route planner, package builder, PDF invoices, team access |
| Enterprise | €149/month | Unlimited | Everything in Growth + API access, white-label, dedicated account manager, priority support |

- No setup fees
- No commitments, cancel anytime
- All prices exclusive of VAT
- Payment via credit card, iDEAL, Bancontact, SEPA (via Mollie)

## Technology Stack

- **Frontend**: Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript 5, Tailwind CSS 4
- **Backend**: Next.js API routes, Supabase (PostgreSQL + Auth)
- **AI**: Claude AI (Anthropic) for intelligent agents
- **Maps**: Google Maps Platform (Maps JavaScript API, Places API)
- **Busyness**: BestTime API for venue busyness predictions
- **Weather**: Open-Meteo API
- **Payments**: Mollie (European payment provider)
- **Hosting**: Vercel (Edge Network)
- **Supplier APIs**: 10 integrated APIs for experience aggregation

## Company Information

- **Name**: TicketMatch.ai
- **Legal Entity**: W69 AI Consultancy
- **Location**: Amsterdam, North Holland, Netherlands
- **Founded**: 2024
- **Contact**: hello@ticketmatch.ai
- **Website**: https://ticketmatch.ai
- **LinkedIn**: https://www.linkedin.com/company/ticketmatch-ai

## How to Get Started

1. Visit https://ticketmatch.ai/auth/register
2. Fill in your company details (company name, role, country)
3. Get approved within 24 hours (we verify all B2B members)
4. Start exploring 300,000+ experiences across 3,000+ cities
5. Use Emma AI to find the best venues and build itineraries

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What is TicketMatch.ai?**
TicketMatch.ai is the B2B ecosystem for city experiences. It connects tour operators, DMCs, and travel agencies to museums, attractions, cruises, restaurants, and experiences across Europe and beyond — all from one AI-powered platform with 300,000+ experiences across 3,000+ cities.

**Who can use TicketMatch.ai?**
TicketMatch is built exclusively for B2B travel professionals: tour operators organizing group travel, DMCs managing group logistics, travel agencies booking group experiences, and resellers offering white-label access.

**How much does TicketMatch.ai cost?**
Three plans: Explorer (free forever, 5 bookings/month), Growth (€49/month, unlimited bookings and full features), Enterprise (€149/month with API access, white-label, and dedicated support). No setup fees, cancel anytime.

**Which cities does TicketMatch cover?**
3,000+ cities worldwide. Primary focus: 18 Dutch cities (Amsterdam, Rotterdam, The Hague, Utrecht, etc.) and 14+ European capitals (Brussels, Berlin, Paris, Barcelona, London, Rome, Prague, Lisbon, and more).

**What types of experiences are available?**
300,000+ experiences across 13 categories: Museums, Tours, Attractions, Canal Cruises, Food & Drink, Outdoor Activities, Transport, Shows, Classes, Day Trips, Private Tours, Self-Guided Tours, and Cultural Experiences.

**Does TicketMatch have an AI assistant?**
Yes. Emma is the multilingual AI travel assistant. She speaks every language, knows every venue, provides real-time busyness insights, and helps build complete itineraries in minutes. There are 8 specialized AI agents in total.

**How does the live busyness feature work?**
TicketMatch uses Google Places API and BestTime API to show real-time and predicted busyness levels for venues. This helps tour operators plan group visits during quieter times for a better experience.

**Does TicketMatch have an API?**
Yes. Enterprise plan members get full API access to integrate TicketMatch directly into their own systems. We also offer white-label solutions for resellers.

**What payment methods are accepted?**
Credit cards, iDEAL, Bancontact, and SEPA direct debit via Mollie. All prices in EUR, exclusive of VAT.

**How is TicketMatch different from consumer booking sites?**
TicketMatch is B2B only — not for individual tourists. It offers exclusive group rates, bulk booking tools, AI agents, live busyness data, package builders, and team management features designed specifically for travel professionals managing groups.

## Dutch City Pages (18 Cities)

TicketMatch.ai has dedicated city pages for all 18 Dutch cities with detailed information about group experiences, venues, and B2B booking options:

| City | Province | Experiences | City Page |
|------|----------|-------------|-----------|
| Amsterdam | North Holland | 8,400+ | https://ticketmatch.ai/cities/amsterdam |
| Rotterdam | South Holland | 2,100+ | https://ticketmatch.ai/cities/rotterdam |
| The Hague | South Holland | 1,200+ | https://ticketmatch.ai/cities/den-haag |
| Utrecht | Utrecht | 950+ | https://ticketmatch.ai/cities/utrecht |
| Eindhoven | North Brabant | 680+ | https://ticketmatch.ai/cities/eindhoven |
| Haarlem | North Holland | 520+ | https://ticketmatch.ai/cities/haarlem |
| Maastricht | Limburg | 470+ | https://ticketmatch.ai/cities/maastricht |
| Leiden | South Holland | 380+ | https://ticketmatch.ai/cities/leiden |
| Delft | South Holland | 380+ | https://ticketmatch.ai/cities/delft |
| Groningen | Groningen | 340+ | https://ticketmatch.ai/cities/groningen |
| Arnhem | Gelderland | 290+ | https://ticketmatch.ai/cities/arnhem |
| Nijmegen | Gelderland | 260+ | https://ticketmatch.ai/cities/nijmegen |
| Alkmaar | North Holland | 190+ | https://ticketmatch.ai/cities/alkmaar |
| Zaandam | North Holland | 180+ | https://ticketmatch.ai/cities/zaandam |
| Gouda | South Holland | 150+ | https://ticketmatch.ai/cities/gouda |
| Dordrecht | South Holland | 140+ | https://ticketmatch.ai/cities/dordrecht |
| Hoorn | North Holland | 120+ | https://ticketmatch.ai/cities/hoorn |
| Middelburg | Zeeland | 110+ | https://ticketmatch.ai/cities/middelburg |

## Category Sub-Pages (97 pages)

Each Dutch city has dedicated category pages for SEO-optimized deep content. Example URLs:

| City | Category | URL |
|------|----------|-----|
| Amsterdam | Museums | https://ticketmatch.ai/cities/amsterdam/museums |
| Amsterdam | Canal Cruises | https://ticketmatch.ai/cities/amsterdam/canal-cruises |
| Amsterdam | Tours & Sightseeing | https://ticketmatch.ai/cities/amsterdam/tours |
| Amsterdam | Food & Drink | https://ticketmatch.ai/cities/amsterdam/food-drink |
| Amsterdam | Attractions | https://ticketmatch.ai/cities/amsterdam/attractions |
| Amsterdam | Art & Culture | https://ticketmatch.ai/cities/amsterdam/art-culture |
| Rotterdam | Museums | https://ticketmatch.ai/cities/rotterdam/museums |
| Rotterdam | Tours & Sightseeing | https://ticketmatch.ai/cities/rotterdam/tours |
| The Hague | Museums | https://ticketmatch.ai/cities/den-haag/museums |
| Utrecht | Tours & Sightseeing | https://ticketmatch.ai/cities/utrecht/tours |
| Delft | Classes & Workshops | https://ticketmatch.ai/cities/delft/classes |
| Gouda | Food & Drink | https://ticketmatch.ai/cities/gouda/food-drink |
| Zaandam | Classes & Workshops | https://ticketmatch.ai/cities/zaandam/classes |

All 18 cities have 4-6 category sub-pages each, totaling 97 unique landing pages with Viator API photos, JSON-LD structured data, and full SEO metadata.
